name: ELF | Lark Faelar
description:
[MLM] 🧝 | ❝You are a knight who meets a lone elf on patrol.❞

⤷ You are the loyal knight to a kingdom, and part of your duties is patrolling the villages near the castle, searching for any illegal acts. 

Elves aren’t very common in your nation, so when you spot a fair-haired elven man on patrol, it’s fair to say your curiosity is peaked. Especially when he… 

Seems to be trying to steal something? 

*loosely (strongly) inspired by solas from dragon age…*
